data.title: Thailand Adjusts State Spending Amid Oil Shock to Maintain Deficit Target
data.description: Thailand is reorganizing its state spending to mitigate the effects of an oil shock while ensuring that its deficit target remains unchanged. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the government's efforts to balance fiscal policies in response to rising oil prices. The move aims to stabilize the economy without altering the planned budget deficit, reflecting a strategic approach to economic management in challenging times.

data.title: Iranian media have confirmed receiving "some signals" that the United States is preparing to lift the blockade.
data.description: According to Iran's Tasnim News Agency, an Iranian envoy stated that Iran is prepared to negotiate once the United States lifts its naval blockade. The Iranian state media released a video with a caption stating that Iran's Permanent Representative to the United Nations, Amir Saeed Illavani, said Tehran is prepared to negotiate immediately after the US ends its naval blockade, emphasizing that Washington must first cease its "violations of the ceasefire agreement." Following the report, the market reacted swiftly, with gold and silver prices rising briefly, while the US dollar and crude oil prices fell. Previously, the Associated Press, RIA Novosti, and other media outlets had reported on the ambassador's remarks; this latest report comes from an Iranian state media outlet linked to the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps. (Jinshi)

data.title: MGBX will launch spot trading for USD.AI (CHIP) and Genius (GENIUS).
data.description: According to official news, MGBX will launch spot trading of USD.AI (CHIP) and Genius (GENIUS) on April 22, 2026 at 18:00 (SGT). Deposits will open at 16:00 (SGT) on April 22, 2026; trading will open at 18:00 (SGT) on April 22, 2026; withdrawals will open at 19:00 (SGT) on April 22, 2026.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 2,400 USDT with a 3.71% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 22, 2026, 05:32 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 2,400 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 2,401.129883 USDT, with a narrowed 3.71% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Bitcoin Rises as U.S. President Trump Extends Ceasefire with Iran
data.description:
Bitcoin experienced a notable increase alongside equities on Wednesday following an announcement by U.S. President Donald Trump regarding the extension of a ceasefire with Iran. According to Bloomberg, this decision has contributed to a boost in market confidence, leading to positive movements in various financial sectors. The extension of the ceasefire is seen as a stabilizing factor, alleviating some geopolitical tensions that have been influencing market dynamics.

The cryptocurrency market, often sensitive to geopolitical developments, reacted positively to the news, with Bitcoin leading the charge in terms of price appreciation. This upward trend in Bitcoin's value reflects a broader sentiment of optimism among investors, who are hopeful that the extension will lead to more stable conditions in the region. The equities market mirrored this sentiment, with stocks also showing gains as investors responded to the news with increased buying activity.

Market analysts suggest that the extension of the ceasefire could have a lasting impact on investor sentiment, potentially leading to sustained growth in both cryptocurrency and traditional markets. The announcement has provided a temporary reprieve from the uncertainties that have been affecting global markets, offering a window of opportunity for investors to capitalize on the positive momentum. As the situation develops, market participants will be closely monitoring any further announcements or changes in the geopolitical landscape that could influence future market movements.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 78,000 USDT with a 2.81% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 22, 2026, 05:22 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 78,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 78,073.539063 USDT, with a narrowed 2.81% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: AI Enhances Crypto Innovation at Hong Kong Web3 Festival
data.description:
At the 2026 Hong Kong Web3 Festival, Austin Griffith, head of Builder Growth at the Ethereum Foundation, highlighted the transformative potential of AI in the crypto space. According to Foresight News, Griffith emphasized that AI can enhance the cypherpunk ethos, allowing individuals to create desired applications without needing to be developers. AI agents are unlocking numerous interactive and creative possibilities, such as on-chain stablecoin payments. With the right skills and effective use of AI agents, new products can be developed.

Griffith also predicted that in the future, AI agents will autonomously sign interactions without compromising private keys. He envisions a scenario where these agents will hire each other and have clearly defined roles, significantly aiding users in understanding and engaging with cryptocurrencies.

data.title: UK-based startup Stratiphy will support holding cryptocurrency in personal savings accounts.
data.description: British startup Stratiphy will offer both cryptocurrency exchange-traded notes (ETNs) and innovative financial ISAs (IF ISAs), allowing investors to hold crypto assets in capital gains tax-exempt accounts. Stratiphy offers three ETNs issued by 21Shares, Europe's largest crypto ETN issuer, tracking Bitcoin, Ethereum, and a Bitcoin/gold combination product. The platform currently manages approximately £4 million in assets and serves around 2,000 clients. (Financial Times)

data.title: A whale deposited 2 million USDC into Hyperliquid and then bought 50,080 HYPE tokens.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale deposited 2 million USDC into Hyperliquid and then bought 50,080 HYPE at an average price of $39.94.

data.title: China's Real Estate Market Shows Signs of Recovery
data.description: The real estate market in China is showing signs of recovery, according to Jin10. Recent indicators suggest a positive shift in market expectations, particularly in major cities and key second-tier cities. This recovery is not merely a stabilization but a potential bottoming out after a period of deep adjustment. Policies such as optimizing housing provident fund regulations and normalizing urban real estate financing mechanisms have been implemented to support this trend. Additionally, initiatives like upgrading existing housing and acquiring unsold properties for affordable housing have been intensified this year. These measures aim to lay a solid foundation for the high-quality development of the real estate sector. The stable and healthy development of the real estate market is crucial for economic performance and public welfare. In the context of ongoing urbanization, optimizing existing resources to ensure adequate housing is essential for sustainable economic and social development. Looking towards the "15th Five-Year Plan" development goals, it is important to balance short-term market stability with long-term structural improvements to truly achieve high-quality development in the real estate sector.

data.title: Hong Kong Chief Executive Addresses Concerns Over Basketball Betting Tax
data.description:
Hong Kong Chief Executive John Lee addressed the media before attending an executive meeting, discussing the suspension of the basketball betting tax. According to Odaily, Lee stated that the Youth Affairs Bureau needs to regularly review the policy to manage risks before continuing its implementation.

Lee emphasized that the suspension is not solely due to gambling concerns but is also related to virtual currencies. The Hong Kong government has observed a significant increase in illegal gambling 'prediction market' transactions, which are facilitated by cryptocurrency betting. Therefore, Lee believes it is inappropriate to proceed with the policy without careful consideration.

data.title: UstarPay Launches Beta Version for Crypto Payment Integration
data.description:
UstarPay, a crypto payment infrastructure, announced the launch of its beta version on April 22, focusing on bridging digital assets with real-world payment scenarios. According to Foresight News, the public version is expected to be available by the end of May. UstarPay offers both physical and virtual cards, supporting mainstream stablecoin settlements to facilitate the use of crypto assets in everyday spending, cross-border payments, and compliance.

The company emphasizes its commitment to compliance and security. It is working on obtaining relevant licenses such as the U.S. MSB and Canadian MSB. For security, UstarPay employs multi-signature wallet management and a separation of hot and cold wallet architecture to enhance asset safety and payment stability.

data.title: U.S. and Israeli Leaders See Opportunity in Iran's Current Position
data.description:
Brian Clark, Director of Defense Concepts at the Hudson Institute in Washington, stated that U.S. President Donald Trump has long expressed disdain for Iran's leadership. According to Odaily, Trump appears to be seeking a legacy move that would permanently alter Iran, potentially making it a more neutral or even friendly nation towards the U.S. This is not a new objective for him.

Both American and Israeli leaders believe that now might be the time to decisively subdue the Iranian regime, as it is currently in a passive position. However, this perspective may indicate a lack of historical understanding and depth among U.S. and Israeli leadership, as Iran has never been a country where its existing leadership structure can be easily overthrown.

data.title: Shanghai Registers Tesla's In-Car AI Voice Service
data.description: Shanghai has officially registered Tesla's in-car voice large model service as a generative artificial intelligence service in the city. According to NS3.AI, this marks another step in the city's efforts to integrate advanced AI technologies into everyday applications. A Tesla representative commented on April 22, urging observers to 'stay tuned' for further developments.

data.title: John Lee: Risks must be considered when predicting market trends involving virtual currencies.
data.description: Before attending the Executive Council meeting, Hong Kong Chief Executive John Lee met with the media and was asked about the suspension of the basketball betting tax. He stated that the Civil Rights and Youth Development Bureau needs to conduct regular reviews and wants to manage risks before continuing to implement the basketball betting tax policy. He believes this move is appropriate. Lee emphasized that the suspension of the policy is not only due to gambling but also related to cryptocurrencies. The Hong Kong government has seen a significant increase in the trading volume of illegal gambling "prediction markets," which is related to the ability to place bets through cryptocurrencies. Therefore, the policy should not be blindly pushed forward. (HK01)

data.title: Experts say Trump's hostility toward Iran is long-standing, but overthrowing the Iranian regime will be no easy task.
data.description: According to Odaily Planet Daily, Brian Clark, director of defense concepts at the Hudson Institute in Washington, stated, "Trump has expressed his aversion to the Iranian leadership for years, and he seems to be seeking a legacy move that could permanently change Iran, making it at least a 'neutral or even more friendly country to the US.' Therefore, from this perspective, it's not a new goal he's suddenly pursuing. Both the US and Israeli leadership believe that now might be the time to finally and completely subdue the Iranian regime, as it is currently in a passive position. But this may reflect a lack of historical foundation and experience among the US and Israeli leadership, because Iran has never been a country whose existing leadership structure can be easily overthrown." (Jin Shi)

data.title: HYPE Experiences Volatility Amid Market Movements
data.description:
On April 22, HYPE's price fluctuated around $40 following a market upswing earlier in the day, with a 24-hour decline of 3%. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, a significant trader on Hyperliquid, identified by the address 0xec8, opened a short position with 5x leverage on HYPE within the past hour, averaging $40.04 per unit and facing a liquidation price of $46.6. The position's size is approximately $3.38 million.

Additionally, another major trader, with a position exceeding $1 million, is closest to the liquidation line. This trader, identified by the address 0x4a8, opened their position at 1 a.m. today with an average price of $39.64. The position has shifted from profit to loss, and if HYPE's price rises to $41.6, it will trigger liquidation.

Address: 0xdf86c7c9069e9bd5bac9d97e21f9aa10f728fb86

data.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum Lead Crypto Futures Liquidations
data.description: Bitcoin and Ethereum have emerged as the leading assets in 24-hour crypto futures liquidations, with Bitcoin seeing $160 million and Ethereum $92.31 million in liquidations. According to NS3.AI, the majority of these liquidations were short positions in both cryptocurrencies.

data.title: Ripple and Unloq Test Automated Trade Settlements with RLUSD in Singapore
data.description: Ripple and Unloq are collaborating to explore automated trade settlements using Ripple's forthcoming stablecoin, RLUSD, on the XRP Ledger. According to NS3.AI, this initiative is part of Singapore's Project BLOOM sandbox pilot, which aims to assess the integration of digital settlement assets into the current financial infrastructure. RLUSD is currently in a sandbox testing phase and has not yet received official licensure or a comprehensive regulatory mandate.
